title: Naik Naik & Co elevates Malabika Boruah to Partnership, gets Stuti Shetty as COO
description: Naik Naik & Co has announced the expansion of its leadership team, elevating Malabika Boruah to Partner and welcoming Stuti Shetty as Chief Operating Officer (COO).Boruah has over 17 years of experience specialising in Technology, Media, and Telecommunications laws. She represents a diverse roster of clients, including leading media houses, talent, and OTT platforms. Drawing on her in-house background, she provides end-to-end commercial guidance, from deal structuring through transaction com
